what_it_does: A research-findings markdown companion covering two threads: whether the coherence model is the same kind of thing as the cognition stream's live model (concluding they share built machinery but differ in kind, resolved by an own/reflect split), and external prior art (fitness functions, code property graphs, agentic dev systems, ADRs) mapped to the deltas the coherence idea adds.
observations: States its two-thread scope and a marking convention: [OBS] observed code, [INF] inferred, [PRIOR-ART] external, [IDEA] own proposal.
Headline: cognition is per-turn/ephemeral, coherence is whole-system/persistent; coherence should reflect-never-own its detection but own its disposition.

Grounds the cognition engine in code: file-discovered roles (roles.py:70-73), declared-AST rules with a closed RULE_OPS grammar (rules.py:65-88), run:// addressing, build_cognition_info as sibling of build_object_info.
Confirms _ORPHAN_ROUTES (suite.py:7017-7054) is an embryonic disposition store mapping to-build-ui/to-wire/voice-owned/backend-only onto the anchor's finish/defer/by-design.

Transfers two cognition mechanisms to solve loop problems: per-rule readiness (settled inputs, never timeout) as the anti-thrash/blocked-without-stalling mechanism, and determinism as the trust property.
Recommends building coherence as an explicit third sibling lens (build_coherence_info), citing the MERGE-COORDINATION 'mode dial built twice' incident as proof of the build-twice failure mode.

Maps prior art with deltas: fitness functions but stateful/held; CPGs but over intent+code with disposition; agentic verifier loops but worklist = self-derived incompleteness; ADRs but as substrate keyed by address.
Argues the recursion is already partly real (drift homes, self-excluding meta-gates) and proposes finding-types as a self-registering registry like roles/rules.
Includes a numbered summary of what to put in front of Tim and a sources list with external URLs.
standouts: The own/reflect split: detection is re-derivable (reflect), disposition is a decision (own) and is the institutional-memory layer.
The disposition-is-a-micro-ADR synthesis tying prior art to the codebase's _ORPHAN_ROUTES.
Using a real in-build incident (mode dial built twice) to justify naming coherence a sibling lens from the start.
conventions: Holds evidence labeling and clearly separates 'convergence is real in code' [OBS] from 'they could be one substrate' [IDEA].
Maps prior art to the delta the idea adds rather than summarizing, as a stated discipline.
Stays in its lane, flagging detection rigor / CPG as another area's territory.
concerns: Thread 2 leans on external sources whose specifics are cited by URL but not independently verifiable from within the file.
Most recommendations are [IDEA] proposals built on [OBS] machinery, so the reader must keep the proposal/observation boundary.
notes: Coherence and cognition share genuine built machinery but differ in kind on persistence; the resolving move is reflect-the-detection/own-the-disposition, making a disposition a micro-ADR and the burn-down history the institutional memory.
questions: What is ANCHOR.md and which of its what-ifs (sections 4, 5, 9) this thread answers?
What are the sibling areas (Area C for detection rigor/CPG) it defers the make-or-break to?
Was coherence actually built as the third sibling lens (build_coherence_info), and were finding-types made a self-registering registry?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: both stated threads (same-kind-as-cognition question and prior-art deltas) are delivered, with the own/reflect distinction as the load-bearing answer to thread 1.
apparent_themes: Same machinery, different lenses (sibling not merge)
Reflect the detection, own the disposition
Disposition as micro-ADR / burn-down as institutional memory
More types, not more tools (finding-types as a registry)
intention_signals: Trying to settle whether coherence and cognition are one substrate (answer: shared pattern, separate data, build as a sibling), and to locate the coherence idea against external prior art so its genuine novelty (stateful, self-derived, address-keyed) is clear.
novelty: The own/reflect split as the design axis and the framing of a disposition as a micro-ADR that constitutes the system's institutional memory in a no-human-developer context.
contribution: Contributes the cross-stream convergence table, the own/reflect distinction, the readiness/determinism transfers, the third-sibling-lens recommendation grounded in a real build-twice incident, and the prior-art-delta mapping.
summary_for_embedding: A coherence research companion concluding the coherence and cognition models share machinery but differ in kind (reflect detection / own disposition), with prior-art deltas (fitness functions, CPGs, agentic loops, ADRs).
intention_for_embedding: To decide whether coherence is the same kind of thing as the cognition stream and to position the idea against external prior art on holding structural integrity over time.
